plugins.name: fable-advisor
plugins.description: Read-only Fable 5 advisor subagent for decisions, plan reviews, and stalled debugging, with Opus fallback when Fable is unavailable.

plugins.name: advisor-select
plugins.description: Pick which model advises the current session — e.g. main conversation on Sonnet, second opinions from Opus. Session-scoped selection with fallback and substitution detection.
